/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Pacman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Scoreboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Ghost_Pinky.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Ghost_Inky.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Ghost_Blinky.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Ghost_Clyde.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/GhostManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PacMan.dir/src/Ghost.cpp.o -o PacMan  _deps/sdl2-build/libSDL2maind.a _deps/ptsd-build/libPTSD.a lib/libGLEWd.a -framework OpenGL _deps/sdl2_image-build/libSDL2_imaged.a -lobjc _deps/sdl2_ttf-build/libSDL2_ttfd.a _deps/sdl2_ttf-build/external/freetype/libfreetyped.a _deps/sdl2_mixer-build/libSDL2_mixerd.a _deps/sdl2-build/libSDL2d.a -lm -liconv -Wl,-framework,CoreVideo -Wl,-framework,Cocoa -Wl,-framework,IOKit -Wl,-framework,ForceFeedback -Wl,-framework,Carbon -Wl,-framework,CoreAudio -Wl,-framework,AudioToolbox -Wl,-framework,AVFoundation -Wl,-framework,Foundation -Wl,-weak_framework,GameController -Wl,-weak_framework,Metal -Wl,-weak_framework,QuartzCore -Wl,-weak_framework,CoreHaptics _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a _deps/ptsd-build/libImGui.a
